free_text: Measurements of evaporation residues to investigate
lower limiting angular momenta in fusion reactions
To obtain ToF signal of evaporation residues
Data obtained from relative measurements are
normalized at the most forward angle to optical model
ANG-CM is polar angle between beam and 12C in center
No information on source of uncertainties
